title: docs.podman.io Logo missing.
body:
When visiting [docs.podman.io](https://docs.podman.io), I don't see the podman logo but `https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/logo/podman-logo.png&raw=true`.

Consider switching that URL to `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/containers/podman/main/logo/podman-logo.png` which should persist as well.

comments.body: @adrian5 Good catch. Can you open a PR to fix this, please.
I'm afraid not (as with my prior reports). I cannot file a PR since podman has a real-name policy and I don't want to tie my GitHub account that I use for everything/hobbies to my real name.
@rhatdan docs.podman.io content is in the podman repo not podman.io please move this back.

It was already fixed, https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/11008
I can see the logo when I select stable or 3.3 on the docs page, only for latest the logo does not show up. I will check what is wrong with latest.
This should be fixed now, latest was not pointing at main branch.

@Luap99 where did you fix it?  Cycling through the versions, I'm seeing a number of others with the same issue.  For instance, v3.2.3 is also broken.  I don't mind fixing them, but I'm not sure what's getting tweaked?

The latest version was still trying to build the master branch. @baude changed it to the main branch.
Unfortunately it is not possible to fix the link for the old releases.
@Luap99 thanks, I was looking all over and couldn't find anything to tweak.
